title: True Darkness
description: Makes darkness truly dark. Light level 0 renders as pure black, even gamma settings can't bypass it.
body:
Makes darkness truly dark. Light level 0 renders as pure black, even gamma settings can't bypass it. Sun, moon, torches, and other light sources still work as expected.

In the screenshots, you can actually see some light caused by lava and glow lichen.

I always liked the spooky atmosphere, and the increased difficulty that comes with true, pitch-black darkness, so I've made this mod. I hope you'll like it, too!

![a tunnel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/681c839c0943864d3876da73213455e584a78a22_0.webp)

Sidenote: I've made sure that this mod is compatible with Sodium and other performance mods. It also works flawlessly with shaders.
